subcategory: tiered pricing page with three plans
use_cases: SaaS subscription plan selection with three pricing tiers
Service tier comparison with feature lists and pricing display
Converting visitors with CTA buttons for each plan
ai_summary: A dark-themed pricing page component featuring three tiered plans (Individual, Team, Enterprise) with gradient text headings, colored icons, feature checklists, and call-to-action buttons. Uses hover effects on interactive elements and displays pricing with annual/monthly toggle support. Designed for SaaS products to showcase value propositions across different user segments.
